channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 in Saudi Arabia
- Aramco helicopter crashes at Saudi port
- Saudi Aramco Helicopter Crashes, Killing 14 Nationals
- Authorities say 14 are dead after an oil company helicopter crashed in Saudi Arabia
- Authorities say 14 are dead after an oil company helicopter crashed in Saudi Arabia
- 14 killed in Saudi Arabia helicopter crash
- Helicopter Crash Near Major Saudi Oil Refinery Kills 14 People
- Fourteen killed in Saudi Arabia helicopter crash
- Aramco helicopter crashes at Saudi port
- Helicopter Crash Near Major Saudi Oil Refinery Kills 14 People
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash in Ras Tanura kills all 14 on board
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crashes, all 14 passengers killed
- Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 in Saudi Arabia
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals: Report
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crashes, all 14 passengers killed
- Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 in Saudi Arabia
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14, state new agency says
- Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals: Saudi media
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crashes in Ras Tanura, killing 14 people
- Saudi Arabia helicopter crash kills all 14 on board
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says
- 14 killed in Saudi Aramco helicopter crash
- Urgent: 14 killed in Saudi Aramco helicopter crash -- Saudi Press Agency
- Flash: A helicopter crashes in northeastern Saudi Arabia, killing 14 -- media
- 14 killed in Saudi Aramco helicopter crash
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14, state new agency says
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash in Ras Tanura kills 14, probe underway
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crashes in Saudi Arabia's Ras Tanura, 14 killed
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 people
- Saudi Aramco helicopter crash west of Hormuz kills 14 Saudis]]>

- More than 1,300 excess deaths linked to record-breaking Europe heatwave, WHO says

- France records around 1,000 additional deaths amid extreme heat wave leading to European records
- France sees 1,000 more deaths amid heat wave
- France sees 1,000 more deaths amid heat wave
- France records 1,000 excess deaths during record-breaking heatwave

item.title: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait following U.S. strikes, threatens to end talks to end war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran attacks Gulf nations, threatens ‘complete halt’ to talks with US
- Iran attacks Gulf nations, threatens 'complete halt' to talks with US
- Iran attacks Bahrain and Kuwait following US strikes, threatens to end talks to end the war
- Iran attacks Bahrain and Kuwait following US strikes and threatens to halt talks to end the war]]>
